raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "evoking a disciplined spiritual orientation toward alignment with perceived divine purpose rather than personal wants",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a higher power exists that can be contacted through inner practices",
    "prayer and meditation can refine awareness of that power's intentions",
    "seeking only knowledge of will and capacity to enact it is preferable to other forms of petition"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as an expression of surrender and focused receptivity, with no contradictory elements within its own framing",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the reader values introspective practices aimed at reducing self-centeredness and accepts the metaphor of a knowable divine will as personally meaningful",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the expression is taken as a literal mechanism guaranteeing external intervention or is used to bypass personal agency and ethical reasoning"
}
